center.name: 內蓋夫 (以色列)
center.summary: 內蓋夫 (以色列)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Blackstart、Mourning wheatear，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: * In Egypt, the blackstart is common in the Sinai Peninsula * In Israel the species is primarily found in the Negev Desert, Arava Valley and Dead Sea areas; it is present in areas of the Jordan River valley further north, but is scarcer there

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Oenanthe lugens lugens - MHNT The mourning wheatear (Oenanthe lugens) is a bird, one of 14 species of wheatear found in northern Africa and the Middle East

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: * In Egypt, the blackstart is common in the Sinai Peninsula * In Israel the species is primarily found in the Negev Desert, Arava Valley and Dead Sea areas; it is present in areas of the Jordan River valley further north, but is scarcer there
